ddls:
CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword itself */,
  "global_monthly_searches" INTEGER /* Global monthly searches for the keyword */,
  "estimated_avg_cpc" REAL /* Estimated average cost-per-click (CPC) for the keyword */,
  "estimated_ad_position" REAL /* Estimated ad position for the keyword */,
  "estimated_daily_clicks" INTEGER /* Estimated daily clicks for the keyword */,
  "estimated_daily_cost" REAL /* Estimated daily cost for the keyword */,
  "local_monthly_searches" INTEGER /* Local monthly searches for the keyword */,
  "keyword_category" TEXT /* Category of the keyword */,
  "keyword_status" TEXT /* Status of the keyword */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the keyword was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the keyword was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Status of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client running the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "ad_platform" TEXT /* Ad platform used for the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keyword_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "global_monthly_searches" INTEGER /* Global monthly searches for the keyword on the given date */,
  "estimated_avg_cpc" REAL /* Estimated average cost-per-click (CPC) for the keyword on the given date */,
  "estimated_ad_position" REAL /* Estimated ad position for the keyword on the given date */,
  "estimated_daily_clicks" INTEGER /* Estimated daily clicks for the keyword on the given date */,
  "estimated_daily_cost" REAL /* Estimated daily cost for the keyword on the given date */,
  "local_monthly_searches" INTEGER /* Local monthly searches for the keyword on the given date */,
  "change_in_search_volume" REAL /* Change in search volume over time */,
  "change_in_cpc" REAL /* Change in CPC over time */,
  "change_in_ad_position" REAL /* Change in ad position over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keyword_performance_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keyword_client_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword being mapped */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client being mapped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keyword_client_mapping_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keyword_client_mapping_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_keyword_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being mapped */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword being mapped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_keyword_mapping_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_keyword_mapping_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_client_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being mapped */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client being mapped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_client_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_client_mapping_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
